content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

July 10, 2003

Mike Miller, Mayor pro Tem
City of West Covina
1510 Newcrest Drive
West Covina, CA 91792

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-141

Dear Mayor pro Tem Miller:

This letter is in response to your request for advice on behalf of the City of West Covina regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 The Commission does not respond to requests where all the material facts have not been provided or to requests for hypothetical advice. (Regulation 18329, copy enclosed.) I have also enclosed the following:

• Sanders Advice Letter, No. A-99-197.

• Fact Sheet “Campaign Contributions May Cause Conflicts for Appointees and Commissioners.”

• Regulations 18438.1 through 18438.8.

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

These interpretive regulations and fact sheet may provide the answers to your inquiries. If you are confronted with a circumstance where you believe the statute is implicated, please contact us for advice at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosures

JWW:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\03-141
